---
title: "Canon Map"
---

# Canon Map

Use this map to jump from intent to the right reading surface.

## If You Need To Ask An AI To Change Code

- Read [What a Spell Is](../chapters/02-what-a-spell-is.qmd).
- Use [Canonical Spell Skeleton](spell-skeleton.qmd).
- Start from [Spell of Safe Refactoring](../spells/safe-refactoring.qmd), [Spell of Test Generation](../spells/test-generation.qmd), or [Code Generation and Repair Loop](../stacks/code-generation-and-repair-loop.qmd).
- Relevant runes: [1172 invariant](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1172), [1088 diff {Forge}](../reference/house-build-tooling-versioning-and-release.qmd#rune-1088), [1152 contract test](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1152), [1445 deterministic](../reference/house-guarantee-words-quality-attributes-and-behavioral-adjectives.qmd#rune-1445)

## If You Need To Diagnose A Failure

- Use [Spell of Bug Diagnosis from Logs](../spells/bug-diagnosis-from-logs.qmd).
- Use [Bug-Hunt Stack](../stacks/bug-hunt-stack.qmd).
- Check [Failure Modes](failure-modes.qmd).
- Relevant runes: [1180 observability](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1180), [1204 trace {Proof}](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1204), [1562 regression](../reference/house-failure-words-pathologies-and-counter-spells.qmd#rune-1562), [1546 leak {Curse}](../reference/house-failure-words-pathologies-and-counter-spells.qmd#rune-1546)

## If You Need To Change Stored Reality

- Use [Spell of Migration Without Data Loss](../spells/migration-without-data-loss.qmd).
- Use [Live Migration Stack](../stacks/live-migration-stack.qmd).
- Relevant runes: [0926 migration](../reference/house-databases-persistence-and-time-binding-words.qmd#rune-0926), [0943 rollback {DB}](../reference/house-databases-persistence-and-time-binding-words.qmd#rune-0943), [0347 schema {Data}](../reference/house-data-state-and-representation.qmd#rune-0347), [1567 schema drift](../reference/house-failure-words-pathologies-and-counter-spells.qmd#rune-1567)

## If You Need To Ship

- Use [Release Gate Stack](../stacks/release-gate-stack.qmd).
- Check [Stack Grammar](stack-grammar.qmd).
- Relevant runes: [1073 canary](../reference/house-build-tooling-versioning-and-release.qmd#rune-1073), [1086 deploy](../reference/house-build-tooling-versioning-and-release.qmd#rune-1086), [1180 observability](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1180), [0943 rollback {DB}](../reference/house-databases-persistence-and-time-binding-words.qmd#rune-0943)

## If You Need Vocabulary

- Start with [The Fifty World-Running Words](major-canon.qmd).
- Use [Pocket Canon](pocket-canon.qmd) for daily vocabulary.
- Use [Term Index](term-index.qmd) when you know the word.
- Use [Master Lexicon](lexicon.qmd) when you know the sigil or house.
